author: lOrm
content: Fixed: ConfabulationTracker.history changed to Vec<Option<f32>>. record_iteration returns Option<f32> (None for zero-findings clean pass). current_rate/latest_rate return Option<f32>. should_terminate uses is_some_and — None entries excluded from threshold. Callers in engine.rs updated. 4 regression tests added. cargo clippy -D warnings + fmt + test --lib clean (1235 passed, 0 failed).
